name: Amkor Technology / 安靠科技
sector: Semiconductor packaging and test / 半导体封测
summary: Amkor 是外包半导体封装与测试厂商，AI 芯片供应链扩张会提升先进封装和测试产能的重要性。 / Amkor is an outsourced semiconductor assembly and test provider. AI chip supply-chain expansion increases the importance of advanced packaging and test capacity.
summaryZh: Amkor 是外包半导体封装与测试厂商，AI 芯片供应链扩张会提升先进封装和测试产能的重要性。
summaryEn: Amkor is an outsourced semiconductor assembly and test provider. AI chip supply-chain expansion increases the importance of advanced packaging and test capacity.

business.description: 公司为半导体客户提供封装设计、组装、先进封装和测试服务，覆盖通信、汽车、计算和消费电子。 / The company provides package design, assembly, advanced packaging, and test services for semiconductor customers across communications, automotive, computing, and consumer electronics.
business.descriptionZh: 公司为半导体客户提供封装设计、组装、先进封装和测试服务，覆盖通信、汽车、计算和消费电子。
business.descriptionEn: The company provides package design, assembly, advanced packaging, and test services for semiconductor customers across communications, automotive, computing, and consumer electronics.

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。

segments.noteEn: The batch draft uses only verifiable total revenue; segment revenue split requires later manual annual-report table review.

business.thesis: 与 NVIDIA 的联系是先进封装和测试产能的间接敞口；AI 加速器越复杂，封装、基板和测试环节越关键。 / The NVIDIA linkage is indirect exposure to advanced packaging and test capacity; more complex AI accelerators make packaging, substrates, and test more critical.
business.thesisZh: 与 NVIDIA 的联系是先进封装和测试产能的间接敞口；AI 加速器越复杂，封装、基板和测试环节越关键。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage is indirect exposure to advanced packaging and test capacity; more complex AI accelerators make packaging, substrates, and test more critical.
riskNotes: 先进封装投资需要较长认证和爬坡周期。 / Advanced packaging investments require long qualification and ramp cycles.
基板、载板和测试设备供应会影响交付。 / Substrate, carrier, and test-equipment supply can affect delivery.
